name: default_error_with_dictionary
description: Error reports unexpected token when dictionary match fails

name: default_error_with_choice
description: Error reports expected alternatives from prioritized choice

name: error_at_correct_position
description: Error column points to the position of the unexpected input

name: error_message_with_rule_instruction
description: Custom error message from rule instruction
grammar:
START <- (LINE (ln LINE)*)? ln?

LINE <- STR '=' CODE

CODE <- HEX / DEC { error_message 'code format error...' }
HEX <- < [a-f0-9]+ 'h' >
DEC <- < [0-9]+ >

STR <- < [a-z0-9]+ >

~ln <- [\r\n]+
%whitespace <- [ \t]*
